items.q: AI says it has no tools or cannot find MCP
items.a: Restart your AI app after adding the NeoSapien MCP. The tool only loads on startup.

items.q: Hammer icon not showing in Claude Desktop
items.a: Check claude_desktop_config.json for JSON formatting errors. Ensure the file is in the correct directory.
Add 'from NeoSapien MCP' to your prompt. Without this trigger the AI may not query your memories. Restart the app if it persists.
Check your internet connection. The server at api.neosapien.xyz/mcp must be reachable.
Fully quit and relaunch the app not just reload.

blocks.title: Still having issues?
blocks.html: Reach out from the Neosapien app and we’ll help you get connected.
